title: Binary search uses at most ⌊lg n⌋+1 comparisons
statement_informal: Binary search on a sorted region of fewer than 2^k keys uses at most k comparisons (= ⌊lg n⌋+1).

cost_model.notes: Each probe halves the region; if n < 2^k then at most k comparisons.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 3 §6.2.1 — binary search (Algorithm B).
